hero_subtitle: From spatial computing and smart cleaning to gaming and aerial creation, SkyEra curates technology worth adding to daily life.
featured_desc: A focused selection of recognizable, frequently used tech products organized around real-life scenarios.
p_visionpro_desc: Immersive media, virtual workspaces, and 3D browsing for creators and premium entertainment users.
p_h50_desc: Strong suction, smart routing, and automated daily cleaning for easier home maintenance.
p_glasses_desc: Open-ear audio with everyday styling for commuting, work, and outdoor use.
p_ps5_desc: Adaptive triggers and haptic feedback bring stronger presence to action, racing, and adventure games.
p_drone_desc: Lightweight body, 4K HDR aerial footage, and travel-friendly size for trips, shorts, and outdoor records.
scene_immersive_desc: For movies, spatial content, and private entertainment spaces.
scene_clean_desc: Move frequent chores to automated devices and keep your home tidy.
scene_mobile_desc: Portable tools for travel, short videos, and social content.
scene_game_desc: Upgrade console control, feedback, and immersion.
trust_title: Content and curation that make buying decisions easier
trust_item_1_desc: Focused on high-demand tech lifestyle products.
trust_item_2_desc: Unboxings, tests, and scene content help comparison.
trust_item_3_desc: Guide users to the brand store for browsing and purchase.
videos_desc: Short and long-form videos present product highlights, real use cases, and buying comparisons.
videos_tiktok_desc: Short videos capture product differences and usage moments.
videos_ig_desc: Show how technology fits daily style, home, and travel.
videos_yt_desc: Full unboxings, comparisons, tutorials, and long-term impressions.
